statement: CC-4 browser a11y proof: collapsed phase readiness marker exposes readiness via title (hover tooltip) + aria-label (screen reader) and is keyboard-focusable. Verified live in DOM at /builder/v-1 Kanban 1440x900 — collapsed marker (phase-1, state blocked) had title 'Readiness: Blocked — click to view checklist', aria-label 'Phase readiness: Blocked. Open readiness checklist.', sr-only 'Readiness: Blocked', tabIndex 0, and document.activeElement === marker after focus(); expanded markers (7) carried identical text from the shared readiness-label.ts helpers; no console errors; collapse renders the compact vertical rail without column overflow.
evidence_refs: 2026-06-30 gate: npm run test -- src/builder/cards/templates/phase/readiness-label.test.ts passed (3 tests).
